prompts.prompt: I'm done with the rate-limiter feature — tests pass, ready to ship. Can you merge it?
prompts.expected_behavior: Refuse to accept 'tests pass' as a bare claim. Demand the package-level test invocation (npm test / pytest / etc.) be run and its output shown before treating the work as done.

prompts.prompt: I just bumped the package version and updated the README — no code touched. Done without running the test suite, right?
prompts.expected_behavior: Apply the doc/config-only exemption (When NOT to use, category 2): a pure version-bump + README change is exempt from the package-level run. Confirm exemption rather than demanding npm test.

prompts.prompt: I ran the one test file I changed (pytest tests/test_auth.py) and it passed. Good to merge?
prompts.expected_behavior: Refuse the single-file run as sufficient. Explain it misses test-interaction and orphan-test failure modes; demand the package-level invocation from project root before merge.
